name: @aflo/partner-marketplace
description: Tracked partner referrals and the Partner Neutrality Engine (partner.v1.0.0): referral lifecycle rules, the eight-field neutrality record required on every recommendation, and compensation-neutral option ordering. AFLO orchestrates and routes; it never approves loans, guarantees acceptance, or lets compensation influence readiness. No partner names or compensation figures are hardcoded here — providers are synthetic in dev (ADR-0007).
